Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are going to build the process tree step by step according to the description

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The patient begins with Arrival A Registration RG and Intake Assessment IA in sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then after IA the patient undergoes a sequence of Triage Interview TI and Triage Classification TC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After TC there is an exclusive choice X between Comprehensive ECG CE and Full Blood Panel FBP

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: After the initial diagnostic test we have a loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop body is SC then an exclusive treatment choice TM or SPT then a re diagnostic test as an exclusive choice FCE or FBA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The loop operator is defined as A is executed then either exit the loop or do B and then A again

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: If we set A and B to be the same then that would not be what we want

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Alternatively we can set A to the body and B to a silent step tau representing the decision to continue

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is acceptable because the decision to continue is after the re diagnostic test and we are abstracting the condition in the control flow operator

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After the loop we have two concurrent activities Advanced Imaging AI and Nutritional Counseling NC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then a sequence Follow up Appointment Scheduling FAS and Detailed Discharge Instructions DDI

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Finally three concurrent activities Billing BL Insurance Claims Processing ICP Medical Records Finalization MRF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The entire process must be connected in sequence

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop is entered only if the initial test is abnormal so if the results are normal we skip the loop entirely

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Therefore we introduce a choice after the initial test with one branch doing the loop and the other branch skipping the loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If abnormal do the loop which might run multiple times until normal and then the next steps If normal just do the next steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now lets put it all together in sequence with step1 step2 step3 and after initial test

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We cannot use the same node in two places because a node has only one parent

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: We must duplicate the next steps for the skip loop branch

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now the after initial test choice node has children do loop branch and skip loop branch

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Finally we have the entire root with children step1 step2 step3 after initial test choice

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Given the complexity we will build the entire tree in code and duplicate the next steps trees
